explanations.1: This connects to an FTP server using credentials embedded in the URL; the format is ftp://username:password@server:port/.
explanations.3: This sets the transfer mode to ASCII, which means files will be converted to text format during transfer instead of being copied byte-for-byte.
explanations.5: This sets the local working directory on your computer to C:\Christophe; 'lcd' means 'local change directory'.
explanations.8: This synchronizes files between your local machine and the remote server, preserving timestamps, automatically choosing between ASCII and binary transfer, and skipping any .git folders.
